title: BIPCircle saga catalogue
description: Schema for products/bipcircle/config/sagaDefinitions.json. Every entry defines a saga type: collection name, allowed intermediate + terminal states, optional timeoutMs (null means the loader substitutes DEFAULT_SAGA_TIMEOUT_MS from the environment), and a human label.

collection.description: Firestore collection name backing this saga type.

timeoutMs.description: Per-saga timeout in milliseconds. null means the loader substitutes DEFAULT_SAGA_TIMEOUT_MS (env-var driven; default 24h). Explicit values must be a positive finite integer.
